title: The Life We Started Building
theme: Realistic dreams become the dangerous ones.
sceneDescription: The life they started building appears as domestic future fragments, plans, and soft imagined rooms.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
